headline: Waste Management Balances Dividend Growth With Medical Waste And Renewable Bets
summary: Waste Management (NYSE:WM) announced a 14.5% dividend increase, signaling management confidence in cash generation and shareholder distributions. The company is expanding into regulated medical waste through the planned acquisition of Stericycle, broadening its service mix beyond traditional solid waste. Waste Management is committing capital to renewable natural gas and advanced recycling projects as part of its long term investment program. For you as an investor, these moves touch...
